name: GolfSim24
address: 601 Oak St Bldg 19 Unit B, Port Orange, FL 32127
about: GolfSim24 is a golf simulator venue located in Port Orange, Florida, open 24/7. It utilizes a fully automated Trackman golf simulator system, offering a realistic golfing experience with the ability to play iconic courses from around the world. The facility features various membership options, including an LTD membership providing 4 hours of simulator time monthly for $120, and an Eagle membership offering up to 12 hours monthly. GolfSim24 emphasizes advanced technology with features such as accurate ball tracking, detailed shot analysis, and customizable practice modes, catering to golfers looking to improve their skills in a controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate ball and shot analysis
24/7 access providing maximum flexibility for practice and play
Variety of membership options offering value for regular users
Ability to play world-renowned golf courses regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Fully automated system mentioned as the core technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it's standard practice to bring your own clubs, though rentals may be available. Contact management at manager@golfsim24.com for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on outside food or drinks. It is recommended to contact management at manager@golfsim24.com for clarification on their policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While a specific time isn't provided, playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes 1.5 to 2.5 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears kid-friendly, promoting family play with packages like the '4 hours of Fun for only $120' and featuring an atmosphere suitable for all ages.
